name: tabrows
description: Keyboard-first outliner with sharing, public links, markdown import/export, and SQLite persistence.

scripts.check:syntax: node --check src/server.cjs && node --check public/app.js && node --check public/storage.js && node --check public/markdown.js && node --check public/outline.js && node --check tests/hygiene.mjs
scripts.check: npm run check:syntax && npm test && npm audit --omit=dev && npm run check:hygiene
scripts.test: npm run test:smoke && npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
